dataset_name: Synthetic D7 live baseline smoke fixture
success_criteria: The live-baseline smoke comparison should run from repo-local projects_dir without default-store mutation.
The synthetic live candidate selector should recover the one registered exact D7 anchor.

metric_criteria.rationale: This synthetic smoke fixture aligns the gold span to the live-selected candidate span.
This synthetic smoke fixture should have one exact true-positive and no false positives.

caution: D7 comparison protocol validation is process metadata only; this synthetic live-baseline smoke artifact is not held-out D7 validity evidence, live-baseline quality evidence, methodological-validity evidence, superiority evidence, or SOTA evidence.
